verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some day when I travel My last mile here The call will be coming for me I will enter the lifeboat, that will be near To carry me overdeath sea

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He’ll hold my hand As over death's river I go And safe I will be In Beautiful Heaven I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My boat will sail safely Though the waves dash high For Jesus will be by my side He’ll calm the rough waters And by and by, I’ll cross the river so wide.
